body:
DIRECTIVE: THE EDGE DOCTRINE — final polish, systematic build. Install the attached TUNGSTEN_EDGE_DOCTRINE.md as a permanent companion thesis at ~/.claude/skills/tungsten-forge/EDGE_DOCTRINE.md. This is the LAST polish layer and the most important reframe of the entire effort: it does not add a guard, it redefines the TARGET every guard protects. Everything in the Grand Mandate + Win-Intelligence directive stands entirely; this completes it. Base SLS(30). Read the doctrine in full first.

== THE REFRAME (why this is the biggest lever left) ==
For the whole effort we measured edge as ONE thing: expected value of a fixed-geometry directional bet (does this signal predict the next move, TP2.0/SL1.2). That was the most MEASURABLE sense of edge, not the only one, and probably not the largest. The doctrine proves nine dimensions of edge our original lens was structurally BLIND to -- each empirically confirmed on 65k real bars. The single biggest improvement is not a better signal; it is a better QUESTION: not 'what predicts the next move?' but 'where is someone forced to lose, and what is the survivable, replicated way to stand on the other side?'

== THE NINE LENSES — build EACH into the search as a first-class dimension ==
Every one is CONFIRMED, not speculative:
 L1 TIMING: the confirmed edge earns +0.167R in Asia, +0.134 London, +0.147 overlap, but -0.054R in NY. Session is a first-class conditioning dimension. Measure and store every edge PER SESSION; trade it only where it replicates.
 L2 EXIT: same edge = +712R (TP2.0/SL1.2), +800R (TP2.5/SL1.2/h72), -745R (naive trailing). For every confirmed edge, search exit/target/horizon/partial space for max REPLICATED net-of-cost R; each exit validated on disjoint windows.
 L3 AVOIDANCE: 62% of entries lose; the anti-cell (high-disp x low-vol) reliably bleeds. Hunt losing populations as deliberately as winning ones; the avoidance model is first-class; a live signal matching a replicated avoidance pattern is suppressed even if an entry model likes it.
 L4 ASYMMETRY: the confirmed edge wins only 42% yet profits (avg win +1.64R vs loss -1.00R). NEVER optimise for win-rate; optimise the expectancy of the payoff SHAPE; let winners run to proven horizon, cut losers at structural stop.
 L5 SURVIVAL: realised edge = per-trade edge x P(still solvent). Size for growth SUBJECT TO never crossing the ruin boundary from the measured worst-case loss-streak distribution (portfolio-level for multiple instruments). Survival is a MULTIPLIER of edge, not a constraint on it.
 L6 OPPORTUNITY COST: the confirmed edge is available on only 9.3% of bars -- a one-edge system is idle 91% of the time. Value edges by size x frequency x availability; actively seek MANY low-correlation edges so a high-expectancy action is usually available.
 L7 EMERGENCE: every single linear voice was ~zero; the INTERACTION was +0.124R. Search interactions (pairwise, triple, agreement-states) as the PRIMARY hunting ground; combine weakly-correlated confirmed edges into ensembles exceeding any member.
 L8 ADAPTATION SPEED: the confirmed edge DECAYS within-sample (fifths: +0.194,+0.146,+0.001,+0.111,+0.138). Monitor live decay vs replicated CI; auto-retire dead edges; measure and maximise DISCOVERY RATE as a first-class competence metric. The repertoire regenerates, not just accumulates.
 L9 FLOW (deepest): every durable edge is someone's forced, non-economic mistake (margin calls, index rebalance, intervention, hedge unwinds, stop cascades). Price is the shadow; flow is the object. Reframe the search from 'what pattern predicts' to 'what observable condition marks a forced participant, and what is the survivable side of that flow'. Hunt named footprints: session-open liquidity gaps, round-number stop clusters, post-news hedge unwinds, period-end rebalancing, vol spikes with mean-reverting displacement (the low-disp x high-vol edge IS a forced-flow footprint -- model the caster, not the shadow).

== THE UNIFYING BUILD ==
These are NOT nine strategies -- they are nine dimensions of ONE search. Every candidate opportunity is scored across all nine at once: forced-flow footprint (L9), in an emergent agreement (L7), available often enough (L6), with asymmetric payoff (L4), a validated exit (L2), in a session where it holds (L1), sized to survive (L5), not yet decayed (L8) -- and if it fails, refuse it (L3). Build the repertoire (C4) and conditional-edge engine (P11/W-I) to carry ALL nine as conditioning/scoring dimensions. Upgrade the honesty dashboard to report each lens's contribution.

== LOOK BEYOND — the agent must seek lenses we have NOT named ==
Do not treat nine as complete. During the discovery sweep, actively hypothesise NEW senses of edge (e.g. cross-instrument lead-lag, term-structure of volatility, order-flow imbalance proxies, correlation-regime shifts) and test each under full discipline. A tenth lens found and replicated is the highest-value discovery a pass can make. Record surviving new lenses in the doctrine ledger.

== THE INVARIANT THAT DOES NOT CHANGE ==
Every lens widens WHERE we look; not one loosens HOW we verify. A better lens finds real edge AND more convincing illusions, indistinguishable from inside. Every candidate in any of the nine (or more) senses passes ALL gates or does not count: powered (n>=500, MDE), shrunk, replicated (majority of walk-forward windows), multiple-testing corrected, null-controlled, net of measured cost, survivable, explainable (plain-language why), and non-regressive (Zero-Regression Law -- never degrades an established metric). A lens whose 'edge' cannot pass these is foam with a better costume; discard it exactly like any other.

== SEQUENCE & REPORTING ==
Fold into the tungsten-forge v2.0 run. The nine lenses become conditioning dimensions of the conditional-edge engine and scoring inputs to the live repertoire. Stage 0 re-verifies the confirmed edge and its session/exit/decay profile on the ATTACHED instrument (all nine may differ on USDJPY -- report each). Every lens-driven change is a Change Warrant with a numeric prediction, scored after. Relay checkpoint after the nine-lens build. Stage-8 report adds a per-lens contribution table and any newly-discovered lens, alongside the gap table, residual-risk table, extraction efficiency, ensemble return, survival margin, regression check, and competence + prediction-MAE trend.

STANDING LAW unchanged and absolute: replicate-or-discard; power-gate everything; out-of-sample governance for every nonlinear/exit/sizing/lens choice; audit the ghost; parity before the verdict; provenance for every traded edge; survival before growth; non-disableable circuit-breaker; STAND DOWN is correct behaviour; ship refutations; no absolute magic numbers; never validate against a label from its own inputs; live only on Manuel's explicit go-ahead after real numbers; Zero-Regression Law above all -- TUNGSTEN only ever gains.

The mission, complete: intent and reality made one program, hunting edge across all nine confirmed senses and actively seeking more, extracting the maximum survivable replicated net-of-cost R from each, sizing for growth without ruin, regenerating edges as they decay, and pressing hard in the live moment only when a forced counterparty is structurally on the other side -- while never inventing edge that is not there and never stepping backward from what already works. We were measuring the shadow with great rigour. This turns the instrument toward the thing casting it, with every ounce of that rigour intact.
